summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Dodo Payments to Razorpay migration. All 30 test files with 384 tests pass successfully. Verified complete removal of Dodo/Stripe references and proper implementation of Razorpay integration across all components.
passed_tests: All 30 vitest test files pass (384 total tests)
razorpay-client.test.ts: 13 tests covering auth, webhook verification, payment verification, plan determination, customer/subscription creation, and timeout handling
tier-checker.test.ts: 7 tests using razorpayCustomerId and razorpaySubscriptionId fields
Complete removal of Dodo/Stripe references from codebase
types/billing.ts: PlanConfig has razorpayPlanId, UserBilling has razorpayCustomerId/razorpaySubscriptionId

lib/billing/razorpay-client.ts: All required functions exported (getRazorpayAuth, createRazorpayCustomer, createRazorpaySubscription, getRazorpaySubscription, cancelRazorpaySubscription, determinePlanFromRazorpayPlan, verifyRazorpayWebhook, verifyRazorpayPayment)
app/api/v1/billing/route.ts: Uses Razorpay, returns subscriptionId+keyId in POST response
app/api/webhooks/razorpay/route.ts: Exists with edge runtime, handles subscription.activated/charged/cancelled/completed events
app/pricing/page.tsx: Shows 'Powered by Razorpay' and payment badges (UPI, Debit/Credit Card, Net Banking, Wallets)
No old files exist: lib/billing/dodo-client.ts, app/api/webhooks/dodo/route.ts, tests/lib/billing/dodo-client.test.ts
